de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.join

Class StdPredicateEstimator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.join.StdPredicateEstimator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PredicateEstimator

    class StdPredicateEstimator
extends Object
implements PredicateEstimator
    Tries to determine the decision predicate. The information about the predicate is extracted from the labels of branches in the proof.
    Author:
    Benjamin Niedermann

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.join.PredicateEstimator

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PredicateEstimator.Result estimate(ProspectivePartner partner, Proof proof) 
      private Node getFirstDifferentNode(ProspectivePartner partner)
      Goes up to the common node of partner.getNode(0) and partner.getNode(1) and returns the next node on the path to partner.getNode(0).
      private Term translate(String estimation, Services services)
      Translates a branch label (without common prefixes such as "CUT:" etc.) to a term.

    • Constructor Detail

    • Method Detail

      • estimate

        public PredicateEstimator.Result estimate(ProspectivePartner partner,
                                          Proof proof)
        Specified by:
        estimate in interface PredicateEstimator
        Parameters:
        partner - Structure comprising the partners of a join.
        proof - The underlying proof.
        Returns:
        A decision predicate for the two nodes in partner. The predicate should be true in the sequent of the first node and false in the sequent of the second node.

      • getFirstDifferentNode

        private Node getFirstDifferentNode(ProspectivePartner partner)
        Goes up to the common node of partner.getNode(0) and partner.getNode(1) and returns the next node on the path to partner.getNode(0).
        Parameters:
        partner - The prospective partner object.
        Returns:
        The next node on the path to partner.getNode(0).

      • translate

        private Term translate(String estimation,
                       Services services)
        Translates a branch label (without common prefixes such as "CUT:" etc.) to a term.
        Parameters:
        estimation - The branch label without prefix.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A term corresponding to the branch label.
